features.title: 患者档案创建
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"测试患者","country":"马来西亚"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("id") else "fail")'

features.title: 患者档案查询
features.behavior: GET /api/v1/patients 返回患者列表，支持分页/筛选/搜索
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients?page=1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("total") >= 0 else "fail")'

features.title: 患者详情获取
features.behavior: GET /api/v1/patients/{id} 返回患者完整档案
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients/1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("id") == 1 else "fail")'

features.title: 患者信息更新
features.verification: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients/1 -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"status":"consulting"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("status") == "consulting" else "fail")'

features.title: 病历文件上传
features.verification: curl -X POST -F 'file=@/tmp/test.jpg' http://localhost:8000/api/v1/patients/1/files | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("url") else "fail")'

features.title: 创建评审任务
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/reviews -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"patient_id":1,"priority":"normal"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("id") else "fail")'

features.title: 评审列表查询
features.behavior: GET /api/v1/reviews 返回评审列表和统计
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/reviews | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("pending_count") is not None else "fail")'

features.title: 医生分配
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/reviews/1/assign -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"doctor_id":1}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("status") == "assigned" else "fail")'

features.title: 评审完成
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/reviews/1/complete -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"conclusion":"建议手术","recommended_hospital_id":1,"recommended_doctor_id":1,"surgery_plan":"根治性切除"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("status") == "completed" else "fail")'

features.title: 医院列表查询
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/hospitals | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if isinstance(d, list) else "fail")'

features.title: 医生列表查询
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/doctors | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if isinstance(d, list) else "fail")'

features.title: 随访列表查询
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/followups | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("pending_count") is not None else "fail")'

features.title: 待执行随访查询
features.verification: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/followups/pending | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if isinstance(d, list) else "fail")'

features.title: 病历 OCR 识别
features.behavior: Kimi 多模态模型提取病历图片文字
features.verification: python3 -c 'from app.services.ai import analyze_image; print("pass" if analyze_image("url") else "fail")'

features.title: 病情结构化提取
features.behavior: 从病历文本提取肿瘤类型/分期等字段
features.verification: python3 -c 'from app.services.ai import extract_info; print("pass" if extract_info("肺癌晚期") else "fail")'

features.title: WhatsApp 消息接收
features.behavior: Webhook 接收患者消息并关联患者
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/webhooks/whatsapp -d '{"from":"123","body":"test"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("ok") else "fail")'

features.title: WhatsApp 消息发送
features.behavior: 向患者发送 WhatsApp 消息
features.verification: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/whatsapp/send -d '{"to":"123","message":"test"}' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("pass" if d.get("message_id") else "fail")'
